personas.name: Emma
personas.description: A university student who uses the app for emotional support during periods of stress, anxiety, and negative thought cycles.
context: Uses the app during exam periods
evidence_reviews: actually could talk one judged helped

personas.name: Ryan
personas.description: A working professional who experiences frustration due to technical issues and chatbot usability problems.
context: Uses the app during work-related stress
personas.notes: Removed vague assumptions and focused on usability and reliability issues.

personas.name: Mia
personas.description: A satisfied user who values the app’s support features and frequently recommends it to others.
context: Uses the app for self-care and emotional check-ins
personas.notes: Refined to focus on satisfaction and recommendation behavior.

personas.name: David
personas.description: A user who compares this app with alternative support services and evaluates relative quality.

personas.name: Sophia
